channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: OpenAI gets $122B to 'just build things' as the world blows them up
item.description: War, oil shocks, and market nerves could yet knock the AI boom off course Opinion OpenAI has secured an additional $122 billion in capital from a diverse group of investors and reached a nominal $852 billion valuation, the highest of any pre-IPO tech company.… [OpenAI]

item.title: Nexstar and Tegna Claim They Can’t Fully Comply With Court Order Halting Merger Because Certain Actions ‘Cannot Be Undone’
item.description: A federal judge ordered a halt to Nexstar Media’s $6.2 billion merger with local TV station group rival Tegna pending the court’s review of whether the tie-up violates antitrust laws. But Nexstar and Tegna say they can’t fully comply with the court’s temporar… [Amazon]
